mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce corporate borrowing costs and lower equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or positive 20-day returns occur in less than 50% of rate-cut periods.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 6.0 percent, labor market slack signals weakening aggregate demand and deteriorating corporate earnings, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in more than 65% of instances where UNRATE crosses above 6.0 percent.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in real personal income and housing starts indicate synchronized consumer spending and construction activity, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict positive returns with a statistical significance level of p less than 0.05 over a 5-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production reflects expanding manufacturing capacity and supply-side momentum, which translates into positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days during periods of stable inflation.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases coincide with negative 5-day forward returns in more than 70% of observations when CPIAUCSL growth exceeds 3.0 percent annually.

mechanism_narrative: Steady growth in total nonfarm payrolls expands household income and consumer purchasing power, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth rates show zero predictive power for 60-day returns with a Rank IC consistently below 0.01 across all market cycles.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent expansion in real GDP and real personal income confirms broad-based economic strength, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative forward returns in more than 60% of quarters when both series grow simultaneously.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production falling below the 95.0 index threshold indicates severe supply-side contraction and factory slowdowns, triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX delivers positive 5-day returns in more than 55% of periods where INDPRO drops below 95.0.

mechanism_narrative: A rising federal funds rate combined with accelerating consumer prices forces monetary tightening that compresses equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined tightening signal fails to predict negative returns with a t-statistic below -1.5 over a 10-year out-of-sample window.
